summary: BLOCK 369: Mobile Image Emergency Fix tested successfully. All four fixes verified: (1) Service Worker with skipWaiting() for cache flush, (2) HTTPS enforcement in imageUrl.js and image_proxy.py, (3) CORS headers on /api/image-proxy, (4) Priority/eager loading for first 5 feed images and Daily Prompt.

issues: React console warning: 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority. Did you mean fetchPriority?' - This is cosmetic only, the HTML attribute works correctly as fetchpriority lowercase.

critical_code_review_comments: sw.js line 9: self.skipWaiting() in install event for immediate activation
sw.js line 20: self.clients.claim() in activate event
sw.js line 31-34: Image caching logic covers /api/image-proxy, /api/files/serve/, discogs.com, and common image extensions
index.js line 11-17: SW registration sends SKIP_WAITING message to waiting workers
imageUrl.js line 9-12: enforceHttps() correctly converts http:// to https://
imageUrl.js line 28,33,38: enforceHttps() applied to all URL resolution paths
image_proxy.py line 13-18: CORS_HEADERS dict with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
image_proxy.py line 21-24: OPTIONS handler returns 204 with CORS headers
image_proxy.py line 33-35: HTTPS enforcement in proxy before fetching
AlbumArt.js line 81: priority prop spreads fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager'
HivePage.js line 872: imgPriority={idx < 5} passes priority to first 5 posts
PostCards.js: imgPriority prop propagated through PostCardBody to card components
DailyPrompt.js line 158-160: First carousel image has fetchpriority='high', loading='eager', decoding='sync'
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 369 mobile image emergency fix verified. Service worker serves from /sw.js with skipWaiting(). CORS headers present on image proxy. HTTPS enforcement in imageUrl.js and backend proxy. Priority loading (fetchpriority='high', loading='eager') applied to first 5 feed posts and Daily Prompt main image. Note: 403 errors in console are from Discogs CDN rate limiting/blocking, not our code - these are external image hosting issues.

BLOCK_369_sw_skip_waiting.details: sw.js includes self.skipWaiting() in install event handler

BLOCK_369_sw_image_caching.details: sw.js caches image-proxy, files/serve, and discogs.com image requests

BLOCK_369_https_enforcement_frontend.details: resolveImageUrl() calls enforceHttps() which converts http:// to https://

BLOCK_369_https_enforcement_backend.details: image_proxy.py line 34 converts http:// to https:// before fetch

BLOCK_369_lazy_loading_first_5_posts.details: HivePage.js line 872: imgPriority={idx < 5} passes priority to first 5 feed posts

BLOCK_369_album_art_priority_prop.details: AlbumArt component with priority=true sets fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager'

BLOCK_369_daily_prompt_priority_image.details: DailyPrompt first carousel image has fetchpriority='high', loading='eager', decoding='sync'

BLOCK_369_feed_renders.details: Hive feed loads correctly with posts visible

BLOCK_369_archive_drawer.details: 'See what the Hive said yesterday' link opens archive drawer successfully

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED with search URL placeholders. Resend email is MOCKED for most platform emails.
